description_long: This is a two-story brick house surrounded by a matching brick perimeter wall, featuring a prominent gabled roof with multiple intersecting sections. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, a double-door entryway, and symmetrical window placement above. To one side, there is an attached garage with a driveway and a separate pedestrian gate. The backyard area is partially visible, showing a patio with outdoor furniture and a possible pool or hot tub. The house has a mix of traditional and modern elements, with clean lines, white-framed windows, and a well-defined entry path. The overall structure is substantial, with ample space for both indoor and outdoor living.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a gabled roof, attached garage, and a brick-walled yard featuring a covered porch and symmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, double doors, symmetrical upper windows, and the attached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid brick wall, minimal windows, and a glimpse of the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large ground-floor windows, patio area, and the back of the garage structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear patio, outdoor furniture, and the secondary roof structure over the backyard area.
attribute_entryway_design: Double-door entry with a covered porch, supported by columns, and a short set of steps leading from the walkway.
